flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Miami Valley Career Technology Center rose 115% between 2002 and 2005 ($2.7k → $5.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Miami Valley Career Technology Center rose 115% between 2002 and 2005 ($2.7k → $5.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Miami Valley Career Technology Center fell 71% between 2021 and 2024 (157 → 46).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Miami Valley Career Technology Center fell 20% between 2006 and 2009 (97.9% → 78.7%).
